description_long: This is a modern ceiling-mounted electric fan featuring three wide, slightly curved wooden blades attached to a central black hub. The fan is suspended from the ceiling by a cylindrical black rod connected to a round ceiling mount. The blades have a natural wood grain finish, contrasting with the matte black metal of the central hub and mounting hardware. The design is minimalist, with no visible blade guard or external controls, emphasizing clean lines and functional elegance. The fan's structure suggests it is intended for indoor use, such as in living rooms, offices, or commercial spaces. The absence of a visible power cord or control panel indicates that controls may be integrated into the mounting or operated remotely.
description: A sleek ceiling-mounted electric fan with three wooden blades and a black metal hub, suspended by a cylindrical rod. The design is minimalist and modern, with no visible controls or blade guard.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the fan from a slightly angled perspective, highlighting the curvature and wood grain of the blades and the cylindrical black rod connecting to the ceiling mount.
description_view_1: View 1 provides a clearer look at the underside of the fan, emphasizing the central black hub and the spread of the three wooden blades.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the fan from another side angle, showing the symmetry of the blade arrangement and the clean connection between the rod and the ceiling mount.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a top-down perspective, making the full span of the three blades and the round ceiling mount more visible.
attribute_blade_guard_design: There is no visible blade guard; the blades are fully exposed, emphasizing a minimalist and open design.
